description: Lock the 2026-06-27 correction of public_newspaper_advertising to paid notices inserted into recurring newspapers, anchored by the Boston News-Letter in 1704.

checks.reason: The date remains anchored to the Boston News-Letter's 1704 solicitation and first paid notices.
A recurring newspaper periodical is the source-backed publication channel for paid newspaper notices.
Auction houses are possible advertisers or notice subjects, not the direct enabling infrastructure for paid newspaper notices.
Theater ticketing systems are possible event-commerce content, not a prerequisite for the newspaper advertising channel.
